blended.narrative: Bretton Woods is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
